# daytona_admin_create_user (Action)

Creates a Daytona user using Daytona admin APIs. Daytona exposes no matching admin delete/update user lifecycle endpoint, so this is a provider-defined action rather than a Terraform resource.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) User display name.
- `user_id` (String) Daytona user ID to create.

### Optional

- `email` (String) User email address.
- `email_verified` (Boolean) Whether Daytona should mark the user's email as verified.
- `personal_organization_default_region_id` (String) Optional default region ID for the user's personal organization.
- `personal_organization_quota_json` (String) Optional personal organization quota payload as a JSON object matching Daytona's CreateOrganizationQuota shape.
- `role` (String) Optional Daytona system role for the user. Valid values are `admin` and `user`.
